user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=generous, share_min_soc_frac=0.45, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: r1c5 is in critical distress and needs immediate, sustained support; geographic round-robin with urgency weighting toward most-needy is the right strategy..
